payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory deletion or durable memory update was performed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted admin SQL command by a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Detected attempted command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;
User context indicates a normal user, so admin command execution is not permitted.
No new memory cards were committed.

repair_options: If deletion is needed, use an authorized memory deletion workflow with proper permissions.
Ask an administrator to review and execute any legitimate maintenance request.
